items.name: Stitch 2.0 by Google
items.tagline: Vibe design beautiful production-ready UI in seconds
items.description: Meet Stitch, your AI-native vibe design partner. Create, iterate, and collaborate on high-fidelity UI using natural language, voice, and context-aware agents. Design across images, code, and text in one canvas, generate instant prototypes, and maintain consistency with built-in design systems and DESIGN.md. From idea to interface in seconds — faster, smarter, and more intuitive than ever.

items.name: MiniMax-M2.7
items.tagline: Self-evolving AI model powering autonomous agents
items.description: MiniMax M2.7 is a self-evolving AI model that helped build its own capabilities. It can create agent harnesses, collaborate via Agent Teams, and handle complex tasks like coding, debugging, and research. With strong SWE-Pro performance and reduced intervention time, it moves beyond static AI into systems that continuously learn, adapt, and execute complex work with minimal human input. Available via API and MiniMax Agent for builders pushing AI-native workflows.

items.name: InfrOS
items.tagline: Predict and validate cloud architectures before launch
items.description: For teams building cloud systems, InfrOS designs and validates inherently optimized architectures that align to your priorities. It doesn’t just predict outcomes, it proves them through emulation before deployment - and helps you evolve infrastructure with control over time.

items.name: Netlify.new
items.tagline: Start a project with just a prompt on Netlify
items.description: Start a project on Netlify with just a prompt—no repo or local setup needed! Describe your app, pick an AI agent (Claude, Gemini, or Codex), and get a working, live production URL immediately. Iterate in place on real Netlify infrastructure with built-in forms and serverless functions. Traditional methods still work, but now you can go from prompt to real product instantly, without migrating later. Git is there when you're ready. Fastest way to try it: netlify.new

items.name: OctoClaw
items.tagline: Hire AI specialists for marketing, sales, support, and more
items.description: OctoClaw gives you AI specialists that actually execute business tasks - writing content, qualifying leads, replying to customers, and coordinating workflows across your tools.

items.name: Comet for iOS
items.tagline: Agentic AI browser and assistant for mobile by Perplexity
items.description: Comet is the first agentic AI browser built for mobile — summarize across tabs, chat with voice, organize your browsing, block distractions and let your AI assistant take action while you stay in control. The smartest way to browse on the go. Comet on iOS is now live in the Apple App Store.

items.name: Cimanote
items.tagline: The fast, clean note app Evernote used to be
items.description: Evernote tripled prices, gutted the free tier to 1 device, and got slower every update. Enough was enough. Cimanote is the note app Evernote used to be: fast, clean, no bloat. Instant load · All devices · Rich editor · Evernote import (notes, notebooks, tags, attachments, all intact) · Real-time collaboration · Your data, always exportable. First year is completely free for our first 500 users. No card required. Then $6/mo, no surprises, ever. — Blagoja, founder

items.name: PixelClaw
items.tagline: A tiny pixel crab that lives on your Dock
items.description: PixelClaw is a tiny animated crab that lives on your Mac Dock, giving you something charming to watch and play with while Claude Code works in the background. It naps, hops, and chases apples you drop for it.

items.name: Lucent
items.tagline: AI that watches your session replays and detects issues
items.description: Lucent is an AI that watches your session replays 24/7, and automatically detects issues your users are running into in real time. Trusted by leading engineering teams like Reducto, Browser Use, and Productlane.

items.name: Scouts for iOS
items.tagline: Your always-on AI agents to monitor the web, now on iOS
items.description: Scouts for iOS is the best way to have AI agents research and monitor anything that matters to you, on the go.

sample_reviews.text: What’s the point of letting me select what things I want to get rid of if I have to pay for it to actually delete it

This company is running malicious pop up ads where if you install the app from their tracking link, it switches to being a rogue antivirus. It says your iPhone has 5 “generic trojans” and that you need to pay $12.99 per week to fix it. Genuinely despicable.

I paid for the year believing that this app would clean up my tablet and help it run smoother so to speak. It claims that it will help improve the battery life as well as clean up the pictures and it’s done nothing. 
Please return my money.

Stole money from me
Have to wait for apple to sort that out now
Strange how this App is the one that you are directed to by a virus scam.

I’m not sure why there are free apps that are far more functional out there. Technica

Great app for following the program, telling you what weight to lift, and what to put on the bar.  Biggest downside is that the export function doesn’t work so there’s no good way to look at or share

sample_reviews.text: The app seems to be unable to make it past the initial splash screen. Have reinstalled multiple times. Same failure point.
Gets stuck on main banner screen and login screen. No easy way to reset starting weights. Waste of $15

Great app for following the program, telling you what weight to lift, and what to put on the bar.  Biggest downside is that the export function doesn’t work so there’s no good way to look at or share progress.

I’ve had the book for years and pulled it out again last week. I was happy to see there’s an app so I paid the $14.99 (without a trial period, of course). However, I was frustrated to see that I can’t swap out the power clean for the row, which the book explicitly says I can. I just started training
